package main import ( "bytes" "fmt" "net/smtp" "strings" "time" ) // BuildFeedbackEmail constructs an HTML-formatted email containing user feedback func BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr string, toAddr string, userName string, subject string, feedbackContent string) (emailBody string, err error) { // Validate required parameters if strings.TrimSpace(fromAddr) == "" || strings.TrimSpace(toAddr) == "" { return "", fmt.Errorf("fromAddr and toAddr cannot be empty") } // Prepare email headers headers := make(map[string]string) headers["From"] = fromAddr headers["To"] = toAddr headers["Subject"] = "User Feedback: " + subject headers["MIME-Version"] = "1.0" headers["Content-Type"] = "text/html; charset=\"utf-8\"" headers["Date"] = time.Now().Format(time.RFC1123Z) // Build HTML email body var bodyBuffer bytes.Buffer bodyBuffer.WriteString("\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("

New User Feedback Received

\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") // User information bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
Username:
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
") bodyBuffer.WriteString(escapeHTML(userName)) bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") // Feedback subject bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
Feedback Subject:
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
") bodyBuffer.WriteString(escapeHTML(subject)) bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") // Feedback content bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
Feedback Content:
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
") bodyBuffer.WriteString(escapeHTML(feedbackContent)) bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") // Timestamp bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
Submitted at:
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
") bodyBuffer.WriteString(time.Now().Format("2006-01-02 15:04:05 MST")) bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("
\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("\n") bodyBuffer.WriteString("\n") // Combine headers and body into final email var emailBuffer bytes.Buffer // Write headers for key, value := range headers { emailBuffer.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("%s: %s\r\n", key, value)) } // Blank line separating headers and body emailBuffer.WriteString("\r\n") // Write HTML body emailBuffer.WriteString(bodyBuffer.String()) return emailBuffer.String(), nil } // escapeHTML escapes special HTML characters to prevent XSS func escapeHTML(text string) string { text = strings.ReplaceAll(text, "&", "&") text = strings.ReplaceAll(text, "<", "<") text = strings.ReplaceAll(text, ">", ">") text = strings.ReplaceAll(text, "\"", """) text = strings.ReplaceAll(text, "'", "'") return text } // Example usage and test function func main() { // Test data fromAddr := "feedback@example.com" toAddr := "support@example.com" userName := "John Doe" subject := "Bug Report - Login Issue" feedbackContent := `Hello Support Team, I'm experiencing an issue when trying to log in to the application. After entering my credentials, I get an error message saying "Invalid credentials" even though I'm sure my password is correct. Steps to reproduce: 1. Go to login page 2. Enter username: johndoe@example.com 3. Enter password: ******** 4. Click Login button 5. See error message This started happening after the latest update. Please look into this issue. Best regards, John` // Generate email emailBody, err := BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr, toAddr, userName, subject, feedbackContent) if err != nil { fmt.Printf("Error building email: %v\n", err) return } fmt.Println("Email generated successfully!") fmt.Println("\n--- Email Preview (first 500 chars) ---") if len(emailBody) > 500 { fmt.Println(emailBody[:500] + "...") } else { fmt.Println(emailBody) } // Optional: Send the email using smtp.SendMail // Uncomment and configure these variables to actually send the email /* smtpHost := "smtp.example.com" smtpPort := "587" smtpUser := "your-email@example.com" smtpPass := "your-password" auth := smtp.PlainAuth("", smtpUser, smtpPass, smtpHost) msg := []byte(emailBody) err = smtp.SendMail(smtpHost+":"+smtpPort, auth, fromAddr, []string{toAddr}, msg) if err != nil { fmt.Printf("Error sending email: %v\n", err) return } fmt.Println("Email sent successfully!") */ }
